mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_info (buyer_id, seller_id, total_amount, status, address_id) VALUES (#{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{addressId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM order_info WHERE seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE order_info SET status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
